text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Birthday wishes from the Mejiros?! 
Is this what they call a birthday bonus?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank Palmer. She asked that we celebrate 
her friend's special day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Palmer was telling us about how much 
she's learned since meeting you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We hope you'll continue to be good friends 
with our Palmer — and us.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
OMG Palmer really is doing the most! 
But I'm so glad I met her too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: And you guys too, we besties now — waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm jealous of your energy. Waheeey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel the Mejiros' dignified image 
crumbling as we speak…
